docket_entries.description: PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD FILED BY PETITIONER PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC AS TO RESPONDENT GONZALEZ, ISAIAS R. JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

POS OF PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD; DECLARATION; NOTICE OF NON APPEARANCE; NOTICE OF HEARING RE: PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION FILED BY PETITIONER PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC
MINI-MINUTES FOR MAY-21-2010 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301

LAW AND MOTION 301, PETITIONER PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC'S PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION HAS BEEN FILED. (PRINCIPAL - $15,622.61) MOVING PARTY IS TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR# 8189
EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO LOS ANGELES COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT GONZALEZ, ISAIAS R.
